'''''Classic Star Wars: The Empire Strikes Back''''' was a reprint trade paperback collection, collecting both issues of the [[Classic Star Wars: The Empire Strikes Back (comic series)|''Classic Star Wars: The Empire Strikes Back'']] series.

==Publisher's summary==
''The best ''Star Wars'' comics creative team ever to put pen to paper, Archie Goodwin and Al Williamson, unite once again to adapt the second Star Wars movie to comic-book form. Join Luke as his Jedi training with Yoda continues and as the Rebels' fight against the Empire takes a turn for the worse.''

*''[[Classic Star Wars: The Empire Strikes Back 1]]''

*''[[Classic Star Wars: The Empire Strikes Back 2]]''
